raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad effaim mehs tai Bal-
fei Jonadaba ta Dehla Rekaba
muhto Tehwa klaufijjcht eeksch
wiſſa/ ko winſch mums irr pa-
wehlejs/ ta ka mehs Wihnu muh-
scham ne dsercam/ wiſſas muh-
fäs Deenäs / mehs / muhfas
Seewas/ muhto Dehti/ un muh-
fäs Meitas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ka mehs Nammus ne
ustaisam par muhtu Mahias-
Weetu / ir Wihna- Dahrſi
mums ne irr/ nedß Tihruns /
nedß Sehſla.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un mehs effaim Teltis
mittuſchi/ ta effim mehs klanſij-
ſchi/ un darriſchi wiſſu / ko
mums muhtu Tehws Jonadabs
irr pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas notikke/ kad Ne-
bukadRezars tas Rehnisch no
Babeles prett tcho Semmi zeh-
lahs/ tad fazzjam mehs: Nah-
zeet/ zelsimees uhs Jerusalemi
no to Kaldeëru Karra-Svehka /
un no to Sihreën Spehka/ ta
effaim mehs Jerusaleme palik-
tuschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad notikke ta KUNGS
Wahrds us Jeremiju/ un faz-
zija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS
Zebaot/ tas Israëta Deews:
Eij/ un fakki teem Wthreem no
Juhda/ un teem Jerusalemes
Eedsihwotaieem : Ne gribbat
uhs Pamahzischann prenemt un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee Wahrdi Jonadaba/
Rekaba Dehla irr pastahwigi
turreti/ kas jaweem Behrneim
pawehleja Wihnu ne dsert/ jo tee
ne irr dsebruschi libos schodeern/
bet tai Pawehleschanai fawa
Tehiva klaufijjchi. Bet es ef-
um us jums runnajs allaschin/
un juhs man ne effat klaufijjcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es etimu pee jums fulh-
tijs wiſſus nammus Kalpus tohs
Praweeschus allaschin / un faz-
zijs: Atgreeseetees jelle ikkatrs no
fawa nikna Zefta / un Darrajt
labbu Darbu/ un ne dsenneetees
zikteem Deewecin pakkat win-
geem kalpoht/ tad palikſeet juhs
tai Semmē/ ko es jums un juh-
seem Tehweem dewis efmu.
Bet juhs ne effat juhsas Ansis
atgreesutchi/ nedß manni klan-
fijjchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka nu tee Behrni Jona-
daba/ Rekaba Dehla to Paweh-
lechanu fawa Tehwa/ ko winſch
pawehleja/irr pastahwigi turrej-
tchi / bet sche Laudis man ne
klausa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht ta fakka tas
KUNGS/ tas Deews Zebaot/
tas Israëta Deews: Reds/ Es
wedditchu pahr Juhdu/ un pahr
wiſſeem Jerusalemes Eedsihwo-
tajeem wiſſu Launumu / ko es
prett teem efmu runnajs/ tadeht
ka es efmu us teem runnajs/ bet
tee ne irr klanſijſchi/ es efmu tohs
atzinajs/bet tee ne irr atbildejschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
